questions.question_text_full: Which statement is NOT true according to the passage?

options.text: Zookeepers take animals home to save them from fire.
The volunteers outnumber the professional fire fighters in Australia.
Around 800,000 hectares have been destroyed due to a bush fire in Australia.
Australia is one of the world's biggest per capita greenhouse gas emitters.

questions.correct_option_text: Around 800,000 hectares have been destroyed due to a bush fire in Australia.
